Class Server

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
public class Server extends Object
Server listens for client connections and manages the poker game logic. It handles player registration, game start, and communication between players.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Server()
    Constructs and initializes the server, including the game table and server socket.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addClientHandler(ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
    Adds a new client handler to the list of connected clients.
    BlockingQueue<String>
    getCommandQueue()
    Returns the command queue used for communication between server and game logic.
    Table
    getTable()
    Returns the game table managed by the server.
    TableRepresentation
    getTableRepresentation(Player receiver, int playersIndex)
    Creates a TableRepresentation tailored to the given player, containing personalized and general information about the game state.
    boolean
    isGameStarted()
    Returns whether the game has started.
    void
    sendUpdatesToAllPlayers()
    Sends an updated table representation to all connected players.
    void
    startServer()
    Starts the server socket, accepts client connections, and waits for console commands to start or stop the game.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Server

      public Server()
      Constructs and initializes the server, including the game table and server socket. Starts listening for client connections and command input.

  • Method Details

    • getTable

      public Table getTable()
      Returns the game table managed by the server.
      Returns:
      the Table instance

    • startServer

      public void startServer()
      Starts the server socket, accepts client connections, and waits for console commands to start or stop the game.

    • addClientHandler

      public void addClientHandler(ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
      Adds a new client handler to the list of connected clients.
      Parameters:
      serverEndpoint - the endpoint representing the connected client

    • getTableRepresentation

      public TableRepresentation getTableRepresentation(Player receiver, int playersIndex)
      Creates a TableRepresentation tailored to the given player, containing personalized and general information about the game state.
      Parameters:
      receiver - the player receiving the table representation
      playersIndex - the index of the player in the players list
      Returns:
      a TableRepresentation object

    • sendUpdatesToAllPlayers

      public void sendUpdatesToAllPlayers()
      Sends an updated table representation to all connected players.

    • getCommandQueue

      public BlockingQueue<String> getCommandQueue()
      Returns the command queue used for communication between server and game logic.
      Returns:
      a blocking queue of server commands

    • isGameStarted

      public boolean isGameStarted()
      Returns whether the game has started.
      Returns:
      true if the game has started; false otherwise
